queryText: smart chair ergonomic posture sensor processor alert system for detecting and correcting user sitting position

resultsJson.title: Chair for correction of posture
resultsJson.abstract: The present invention relates to a chair to correct the posture of a user. The present invention is to provide a chair to correct the posture of a user, which detects the position and posture of the user sitting on the chair to output a correction signal to allow the user to keep a good posture. To this end, according to the present invention, the chair comprises: a seat where a user sits; a back installed on one side of the seat to support the back of the user; a supporter installed on a bottom side of the seat; an input unit installed on the seat to detect a motion setting signal of a sensor unit to detect a posture from the user; the sensor unit installed on a random position of the seat and the back to detect and output a position signal in accordance with the users sitting position; a control unit which compares the sitting position signal of the user detected by the sensor unit with a preset posture correction position signal to control the output of a posture correction signal in accordance with the result of the comparison; and an alert unit which, when the posture correction signal is outputted by the control unit, outputs a warning sound. As such, the present invention is able to detect the position and posture of a user sitting on the chair and output a correction signal, thereby allowing the user to take and keep a good posture.

resultsJson.title: Posture correction warning chair
resultsJson.abstract: The present invention relates to a posture correction warning chair, which enables recognition of a current posture by a posture sensor, a notification through vibration to a user by a diaphragm, and a signal to the user through a sound alarm by a speaker. By allowing people to sit for a long time, they can solve the problem that their posture collapses unconsciously the longer they sit, thereby solving the existing problem that their posture collapses unconsciously the longer they sit.  That is, the present invention is a posture sensor configured by placing a sensor on the back portion to recognize the current posture in a chair, a vibration plate configured in a square plate shape to give a notification to the user through vibration, and a user through a sound alarm. It consists of a speaker located on the neck of the backrest to give a signal to the user, a chair body composed of a soft cushion feeling so that the user can sit comfortably, and four wheels to facilitate the movement of the chair.  Therefore, the present invention enables the user to recognize the current posture by the posture sensor, to give a notification to the user through vibration by the diaphragm, and to give a signal to the user through a sound alarm by the speaker, so that long sitting is possible. It has the effect of solving the existing problem that the posture collapses unconsciously the longer one sits by solving the problem that the posture collapses unconsciously the more one sits.

resultsJson.title: Chair for posture reform
resultsJson.abstract: Disclosed is a posture correcting chair in which a user can recognize the posture of a user sitting on a chair. In the chair comprising a seat plate which can be seated by the user, the seat plate which is generally perpendicular to the seat plate, a back support for supporting the user's back and a support leg installed on the bottom of the seat plate, wherein the posture correcting chair is mounted on the seat plate. At least one seat detection means installed, at least one attitude detection means installed on the backrest and vibration means provided on the seat plate or backrest. The posture correcting chair detects that the user sits on the chair by means of a seating detecting means, and detects whether the user's back is closely attached to the back of the chair by the posture detecting means, such as a vibration or an alarm sound when the posture is not correct. By using the alarm means to allow the user to recognize his or her incorrect posture, the user can always sit in the correct posture on the chair.

resultsJson.title: Sitting posture detection chair
resultsJson.abstract: The present invention relates to a sitting posture sensing chair, and more specifically, by detecting whether the person sitting on the chair is in the correct posture or sitting for a long time, an alarm can be provided to the seated person to guide the seated person to the correct posture. This is about a posture-sensing chair mounted on a chair that can prevent diseases that may occur due to this condition.

resultsJson.title: posture correction chair
resultsJson.abstract: A sitting posture correcting chair belongs to furniture and mainly solves the problem that the existing chairs cannot restrict the sitting posture of users. It includes a chair foot, a chair surface and a chair back, and is characterized in that a pressure sensor is provided at the center of the front of the chair back, an alarm is provided at a corner of the chair back, and the pressure sensor is electrically connected with the alarm. In a normal sitting posture, the back of the person will touch the pressure sensor, and the pressure sensor will not act; when the person’s sitting posture is not correct and the desk is too close, the back of the person will leave the pressure sensor, the pressure sensor will lose pressure, and it will send a signal to the alarm. The alarm alarm reminds people to pay attention to recovering the correct sitting posture. The utility model can remind people to keep the correct sitting posture, form good habits, and provide convenience for people.

resultsJson.title: Posture correction chair System
resultsJson.abstract: An objective of the present invention is to provide a posture correction chair system installed in equipment, such as a chair, to correctly detect a seating state of a user. According to the present invention, the system comprises: a posture detection sensor including a plurality of sensors to detect whether or not a body part of a user is in contact with a chair when the user sits on the chair; a control unit determining a sitting posture of the user based on information extracted through a posture detection unit to generate a posture detection signal; a sound output unit to receive the posture detection signal to output a warning sound; a communication unit to transmit the posture detection signal to the sound output unit and a terminal; and a power signal transmission unit receiving the posture detection signal to supply or cut off power for a television (TV) set.

resultsJson.title: Chair with posture alarm
resultsJson.abstract: The utility model provides a chair with an alarm for incorrect sitting posture, which includes a chair surface, a chair back connected with the chair surface and four supporting legs. The chair surface is provided with a first sensor, and the front of the chair back is provided with a first sensor. Two sensors, the back of the chair is provided with an alarm. The beneficial effect of the utility model is that a first sensor is provided on the chair surface, which can be sensed when a person sits on it, and a second sensor is provided on the back of the chair, which can sense the position of the back of the human body. When it is not within the range, the alarm will alarm to remind people to adjust their sitting posture, which is beneficial for people to develop a correct sitting posture and good for their health.

resultsJson.title: System for improving body posture
resultsJson.abstract: A system is provided for inducing improvement in sitting posture. The system is associated with a seating device having a seat and a backrest. The system includes a first member associated with the seat or with the backrest and a second member associated with the backrest. At least one sensor is located in the first member for detecting the presence of a user and for providing an indication of the presence of the user. At least one sensor is located in the second member for detecting the position of the user's back and for providing an indication of the position of the user's back. An alarm is connected to the sensors for informing the user whether the sitting posture is correct or incorrect, based on the indications of the sensors.

resultsJson.title: A sitting posture monitoring chair
resultsJson.abstract: The invention discloses a sitting posture monitoring chair, which comprises chair legs, a seat board, a backrest, a tilt detection switch for detecting the pressure state of the seat board, and a leaning detection switch for detecting the pressure state of the backrest, the tilt detection switch The control circuit is connected with the leaning detection switch, and the control circuit judges whether the sitting posture of the human body is correct according to the opening and closing states of the tilt detection switch and the leaning detection switch, and when a bad sitting posture is detected or the duration of maintaining the bad sitting posture reaches the set time , drive the reminder device to give an alarm. In the present invention, by installing a detection device on the seat that people must use when they work and study, the seat has the supervision function of detecting the sitting posture of the human body. Because the seat allows the user to sit in a bad posture in a short period of time, the user's sitting comfort and psychological acceptance are improved without affecting the user's spine, lumbar spine and vision.

resultsJson.title: Movable seat surface posture correcting chair with real-time monitoring and alarm function
resultsJson.abstract: A posture correcting chair with a movable seat surface and a real-time monitoring and alarm function relates to a posture correcting chair. In order to solve the problem that the posture correction effect of the current posture correction chair is not good. It includes a seat surface, a seat seat and a chair back, and it also includes a support sensing device, a seat back position adjustment device and an alarm device; The back side of the seat is used to adjust the horizontal distance between the back of the chair and the seat surface. The support sensing device is arranged on the front side of the bottom surface of the seat surface. When the support sensing device is pressed by the seat surface, the support sensing device outputs a sensing signal to the alarm device. It is used to correct sitting posture.

resultsJson.title: One kind of warning device to prevent poor sitting posture
resultsJson.abstract: This creation is a bad sitting posture warning device can be firmly attached in a chair, with the sensors to sense if someone sitting in a chair. This device may set the sensors close and fixed at one or more specific locations of the back or seat of a chair, to sense whether the sitter's back or buttock touch these sensors or not, when the sitter's back or buttock separate from these sensors, it can generate alert signals to alert the sitter having bad sitting posture; or when the sitter is continuously sitting on the chairs for longer than a period of time, the device will generate alert signals to remind the sitter to get away from the chair.

resultsJson.title: An intelligent office chair that improves sitting posture
resultsJson.abstract: The utility model discloses an intelligent office chair capable of improving sitting posture, comprising a seat body, wherein the seat body comprises a seat cushion, a bracket, a roller, a backrest, a backrest and an armrest; a sedentary detection module is arranged in the middle of the seat cushion, which is located in the seat cushion The front end is provided with a cross-leg detection module; the backrest and the pillow are provided with an upright detection module; the backrest is provided with an infrared scanning module; the sedentary detection module, the Erlang leg detection module, the upright detection module and the infrared scanning module pass through respectively. The signal wire is connected with the controller, and the controller is fixedly installed on the bottom surface of the seat cushion; the controller is also connected with a switch button and an alarm module through the signal wire; the switch button and the alarm module are respectively installed on the armrests on both sides of the seat. The utility model can effectively detect the sitting posture of the user, and when the sitting posture is incorrect, an alarm is issued to remind people to help people correct the bad sitting posture, thereby preventing various occupational diseases caused by the incorrect sitting posture of office workers.

resultsJson.title: Intelligent sitting posture correcting seat
resultsJson.abstract: The utility model provides an intelligent sitting posture correction seat, which comprises a seat body, wherein an infrared distance meter for measuring the distance between the back of a human body and the backrest is arranged at the middle upper part of the backrest of the seat; two pairs of infrared sensors with adjustable positions are arranged at the two armrests of the seat; monitoring boundaries of the two pairs of infrared sensors are positioned in front of and behind the waist position of a reasonable sitting posture of a human body; a gravity sensor for monitoring whether a person uses the seat is arranged on the seat surface of the seat; the seat is also provided with a sound and light alarm device; the gravity sensor, the infrared distance meter, the infrared sensor and the audible and visual alarm device are connected with the control module; when the time length of a person sitting on the seat exceeds a threshold value, the infrared distance meter, the infrared sensor and the audible and visual alarm device are started; when the sitting posture of the person does not accord with the preset sitting posture standard of the seat, the sound and light alarm device gives out a prompt; the product can monitor and alarm the sitting posture of a user, and allows the user to define alarm triggering conditions according to the self condition.

resultsJson.title: Posture Chair and Cushion
resultsJson.abstract: The present invention relates to a posture corrector and a cushion so that the seated person always maintains the correct seating posture by warning or correcting when the sitting posture is inclined or poor. A seating unit, a seating sensor module provided at the seating unit and detecting the seating state, a control unit determining whether a time when a seating state is detected in the seating sensor module lasts for a predetermined time, and alarms the user according to the determination of the control unit It provides a posture corrector comprising an alarm unit.

resultsJson.title: A self-correcting intelligent ergonomic chair
resultsJson.abstract: The utility model discloses a self-correcting intelligent ergonomic chair in the technical field of smart home, comprising a chair, a motor, a main control module, a motor drive module, a power supply module, an angle sensor, a touch screen module, a voice control module, a Bluetooth module and a pressure sensor , the angle sensor is used to detect the tilt angle data of the back of the chair and transmit it to the main control module, the touch screen module is used to detect the data set by the user on the touch screen, and transmit the data to the main control module, the voice The control module is used to detect the voice signal data and transmit it to the main control module. Realize healthy, comfortable and multi-directional sitting freedom, automatically correct the user's sitting posture, scientifically analyze the user's sitting posture based on big data and adjust the angle most suitable for the user, and correct the wrong sitting posture.

resultsJson.title: smart chair
resultsJson.abstract: The present invention relates to a smart chair, and a posture correction device that is installed on a chair including a seat and a backrest so that a user can sit and tightly restrains the backrest for the correct posture of the user, wherein the posture correction device comprises: a support frame that extends upwardly from the rear of the backrest and is provided so as to be rotatable forward/backward; a shoulder restraint frame that is connected to the upper end of the support frame so as to be rotatable up/down toward the front and restrains both shoulders of a user sitting on the seat; and a first driving unit that is provided at the rear of the seat and rotates the shoulder restraint frame by winding a wire connected to the shoulder restraint frame. The present invention relates to a wearable chair that allows the user to sit on the chair in various postures without inconvenience in the user's usual movements, while helping the user maintain the correct posture by a frame controlled by an driving unit as needed, and that provides information to the user's smartphone so as to record the monitoring and posture correction process.

resultsJson.title: Smart correction chair
resultsJson.abstract: The present invention relates to a smart correction chair that can correct the user's posture by detecting the posture of the user seated on the chair. A smart correction chair according to an embodiment of the present invention includes a seat, backrest, armrests, a pressure measurement sensor provided on the seat and backrest to generate a pressure value, a weight sensor provided on one side of the seat to generate the user's weight value, A distance sensor provided on one side of the backrest to generate a distance value between the backrest and the user, a warning device provided on at least one of the seat, backrest, and armrest, and at least one of the pressure value, the weight value, and the distance value. It includes a processor that operates the warning device based on.

resultsJson.owner: 浙江陀曼精密机械有限公司
resultsJson.title: A seat posture detection system and method thereof
resultsJson.abstract: A seat posture detection system, including a control processing device and a sensing device, the control processing device includes a main controller, a memory and a wireless transmission module, the main controller is connected to a mobile terminal through the wireless transmission module; the sensing device includes a Proximity switch on chair back. When the user is seated, the proximity switch detects and sends the detection signal to the main controller. The main controller analyzes and calculates the received signal. If the sensing signal of at least one of the proximity switches of the body and the lumbar support is detected, the main controller controls the corresponding program module to send feedback to remind the user to correct the sitting posture. With the assistance of the sensing device and the control processing device, an intelligent health chair is formed to monitor people's sitting posture. When the user's sitting posture is incorrect, the head, back or waist are not in the correct position, and the sitting posture is not correct, the user will be reminded. The user corrects the sitting posture.

resultsJson.title: Self-alarming sitting posture correction chair
resultsJson.abstract: The utility model discloses a self-warning sitting posture correcting chair, wherein a first infrared distance measuring sensor is arranged on a bracket, a counterweight block is arranged at one end of a vertical line far away from a chair seat, a second infrared distance measuring sensor is arranged on the counterweight block, the distance between a user and a back cushion is monitored by the first infrared distance measuring sensor in real time, a vibrator is started after a certain time of exceeding a preset distance interval of a main controller, the user is reminded to correct sitting posture by vibration of the vibrator, when the user leans forward, the second infrared distance measuring sensor takes gravity as reference under the action of the vertical line and the counterweight block, when the chair leans forward, the distance between the counterweight block monitored by the second infrared distance measuring sensor and the inner wall of a monitoring frame exceeds the preset distance interval of the main controller after a certain time, and starting the vibrator, and reminding a user to correct the sitting posture through vibration of the vibrator.

resultsJson.owner: 东莞市庆鑫实业有限公司
resultsJson.title: A kind of Intelligent sitting posture monitoring correction seat
resultsJson.abstract: The utility model relates to technical field of furniture, correction seat is monitored more particularly to a kind of Intelligent sitting posture, including seat, seat board, L-type connecting plate and backrest, the seat board are set to seat top, the L-type one end of the connection board is connected to seat, and the other end connects backrest；The backrest is equipped with sitting posture detection device, the sitting posture detection device includes human body sensor, sitting posture comparison device, alarming device and power supply connecting device, and the power supply connecting device is electrically connected with human body sensor, sitting posture comparison device and alarming device；The utility model is provided with human body sensing on the seat and plays corrective action to sitting posture, improves appearance the problems such as rectifying, prevent stature out of shape of teenager's sitting posture in study or operation, and practicability is stronger.

resultsJson.owner: 成都迈奥信息技术有限公司
resultsJson.title: Intelligent seat with function of sitting posture correction
resultsJson.abstract: The invention discloses an intelligent seat with a function of sitting posture correction. The intelligent seat comprises a backrest (1), a seat body (3) and chair legs (4), wherein pressure sensors (2) are arranged on the contact surface of the backrest (1); two alarm devices (6) are arranged at the two sides of the backrest (1); the top of the backrest (1) is provided with a man-computer interaction screen (8); pressure sensors (2) are arranged on the contact surface of the seat body (3); the bottom of the seat body (3) is provided with a processor and a timer; the pressure sensors (2), the man-computer interaction screen (8) and the timer are connected with the processor. When the sitting posture of a user is not correct, the intelligent seat shakes at a certain amplitude and an alarm is given to remind the user.

resultsJson.title: A chair cushion that is making alarm unless on a sit up-right
resultsJson.abstract: The present invention relates to an invention that detects an incorrect sitting posture of a user in a chair cushion when a user sits in a chair, and provides an alarm when detecting an incorrect sitting position to guide the user to sit in a chair in the correct posture, It is characterized in that it includes an upper plate 100 , a cushion lower plate 200 , a posture sensing unit 300 , an alarm unit 400 , and a cushion cover 500 .

resultsJson.title: Active Chair with Posture Feedback
resultsJson.abstract: An active chair system incorporates a tilt sensor to detect and measure the tilt of the seat above a pivot point and displays data about that tilt to the user to enable posture corrections to address subtle posture issues that a user might not otherwise recognize.
